en_title: Rockstar Dishes Out Free GTA 5 Current-Gen Upgrades to PS4 and Xbox One Owners
cn_title: Rockstar 为《GTA5》推出免费次世代升级
subtitle: 最后的冲刺
opus_summary: Rockstar 宣布，自6月18日起，拥有Xbox One数字版或PS4任意版本《GTA5》的玩家，均可免费升级至当前世代版本，并能转移全部游戏进度。

paragraphs.en: If you own a digital copy of Grand Theft Auto V on Xbox One or any kind of copy on PS4, you'll be entitled to a free upgrade to the current-gen versions of the game starting tomorrow, June 18.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你在 Xbox One 上拥有《GTA5》的数字版，或者在 PS4 上拥有任何版本的《GTA5》，从明天（6月18日）起，你就可以免费升级到当前世代的版本。

paragraphs.en: Rockstar Games announced the upgrades while detailing GTA Online's next big update , which arrives in July. Rockstar specified that these upgrades will apply to the digital version on Xbox One and to any copy on PS4, which seems to include physical copies as well. Presumably, this will only apply within platform families (PS4 to PS5, for example). As has been the case for years, you'll also be able to migrate all of your progress over, ensuring everything you've earned transfers with you.
paragraphs.cn: Rockstar 在详细介绍《GTA Online》下一次重大更新时宣布了这一免费升级，该更新将于7月上线。Rockstar 明确表示，此次升级适用于 Xbox One 的数字版，以及 PS4 的任何版本，似乎也包括实体版。据推测，这仅限同平台家族内升级（例如从 PS4 升级到 PS5）。和以往一样，你还可以将所有游戏进度迁移过去，确保你获得的一切都随你一起转移。

paragraphs.en: Currently, GTA 5 costs $39.99 on current-gen platforms, so this is a steal. If you haven't been interested in double (or triple!) dipping on GTA 5, Rockstar is making things easy on you. The current-gen versions of GTA 5 have been available since March 2022, and while it isn't a wildly dramatic leap from last-gen, it does provide a much smoother experience thanks to things like 60 FPS.
paragraphs.cn: 目前，《GTA5》在当前世代平台的售价为 39.99美元(约合人民币270元)，所以这次免费升级相当划算。如果你之前对《GTA5》的二次（甚至三次！）付费不感兴趣，Rockstar 这次帮你省事了。《GTA5》的当前世代版本自2022年3月起就已推出，尽管相比上一代没有翻天覆地的变化，但确实能带来更流畅的体验，比如支持60帧。

paragraphs.en: Although this is partly to get people interested in the upcoming update, which will revolve around yet another heist, there is another big reason: GTA 6 is finally coming out this November , which means sales for the juggernaut title will likely begin to soften a bit over the next few months as fans prepare for what's next. It makes sense to give GTA 5 one last big push before it is inevitably sent out with a bang.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然这在某种程度上是为了吊起人们对即将到来的更新的兴趣，该更新将围绕又一场抢劫任务展开，但还有另一个重要原因：《GTA6》终于要在今年11月发售了，这意味着随着粉丝们准备迎接新作，这款巨作的销量可能会在未来几个月开始有所回落。在《GTA5》不可避免地迎来最后辉煌之前，给它最后一次大力推广，是合情合理的。

paragraphs.en: As of right now, Rockstar has yet to release any details about GTA 6's online mode, so it's hard to say if any of your progress will carry over. Given that people have spent 13 years building a life in GTA Online, some fans are hoping they'll get to bring some goodies with them to Vice City, but it wouldn't be surprising if everyone got a fresh start when the mode drops.
paragraphs.cn: 目前，Rockstar 尚未公布《GTA6》线上模式的任何细节，因此很难说你的游戏进度能否继承过去。考虑到玩家们在《GTA Online》中花了13年建设自己的生活，一些粉丝希望他们能把一些好东西带到罪恶都市，但如果线上模式推出时人人都从零开始，也不会令人意外。

paragraphs.en: Fans are currently waiting with bated breath for the next look at GTA 6, which is expected to arrive this summer. It wouldn't be surprising if Rockstar waits until after the release of this new update in July, so it doesn't distract anyone from the new content it's trying to push to fans.
paragraphs.cn: 粉丝们目前正屏息以待《GTA6》的下一波展示，预计会在今年夏天到来。如果 Rockstar 等到7月这次新更新发布之后再公布，以免分散玩家对新内容的注意力，那也不足为奇。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder 是 IGN 新闻团队的一名自由撰稿人。他负责报道各类娱乐新闻，包括游戏、电影等。你可以在 Twitter 上找到他 @Cade_Onder。

manual_approved_issues.detail: source contains 'Grand Theft Auto', but required dictionary translation '侠盗猎车手' is missing
